title: Acceptance calibration record (P-C — per class, keyed by judge identity)
description: One record per acceptance class (static = M1 / browser_e2e = M3), keyed by the FULL judge identity. A change to ANY identity field invalidates the record (extends Constitution §3.4 invariant #6 / §3.6). The authority gate checks the record matching the ACTIVE class; M3 stays advisory until an M3-class browser/E2E bad-case suite exists AND the record is calibrated to threshold. v1 ships NO M3 record ⇒ M3 is never authoritative ⇒ a browser-functional pass HALTs for human sign-off.

skill_set_hash.description: Hash of the mounted evidence-reading skill set (a change invalidates the record).

effective_config_hash.description: Hash of the full effective Acceptance role configuration.

evidence_contract_id.description: The browser-evidence-manifest contract version the M3 judge was calibrated against.

executor_contract_id.description: The executor-contract id the M3 record is bound to.
